ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the farm */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the farm */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the farm */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the farm was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_types" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil type */,
  "soil_name" TEXT /* Name of the soil type (e.g., Sandy, Loamy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the soil type */,
  "pH_min" REAL /* Minimum pH value for the soil type */,
  "pH_max" REAL /* Maximum pH value for the soil type */,
  "organic_matter_min" REAL /* Minimum organic matter content */,
  "organic_matter_max" REAL /* Maximum organic matter content */,
  "drainage" TEXT /* Drainage characteristics of the soil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop type (e.g., Maize, Sugarcane) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop type */,
  "growth_cycle" INTEGER /* Average growth cycle of the crop in days */,
  "optimal_temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum optimal temperature for the crop */,
  "optimal_temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum optimal temperature for the crop */,
  "optimal_humidity_min" REAL /* Minimum optimal humidity for the crop */,
  "optimal_humidity_max" REAL /* Maximum optimal humidity for the crop */,
  "crop_yield" REAL /* Average yield of the crop per hectare */,
  "crop_use" TEXT /* Primary use of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilizers" (
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilizer */,
  "fertilizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the fertilizer (e.g., Urea, DAP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fertilizer */,
  "nitrogen_content" REAL /* Nitrogen content of the fertilizer */,
  "phosphorous_content" REAL /* Phosphorous content of the fertilizer */,
  "potassium_content" REAL /* Potassium content of the fertilizer */,
  "application_rate" REAL /* Recommended application rate of the fertilizer */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the fertilizer */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of the fertilizer per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertilizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm where the data was collected */,
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil type */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop type */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "moisture" REAL /* Moisture reading */,
  "nitrogen" REAL /* Nitrogen content */,
  "potassium" REAL /* Potassium content */,
  "phosphorous" REAL /* Phosphorous content */,
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fertilizer used */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_soil_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_id") REFERENCES soil_types ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_fertilizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("fertilizer_id") REFERENCES fertilizers ("fertilizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crop_types ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in minutes */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_points table */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)
